# MZI White Label Pro v3.0.1

## Highlights

This release improves client-facing polish and maintenance hygiene. Settings now include clearer helper descriptions, changelogs are preserved per version, more third-party dashboard widgets can be hidden, and client users can be shielded from update notices while administrators continue to see important maintenance signals.

## Added

- Persistent changelog registry for versioned release history.
- Helper descriptions under every plugin setting.
- Dashboard widget hide options for:
  - Yoast SEO Posts Overview
  - Elementor Overview
  - Yoast SEO / Wincher: Top Keyphrases
- Security option to hide update notices in Client Mode for non-administrator users.

## Changed

- Changelog tab now renders structured version entries.
- Generated release ZIP files are ignored by Git.

## Compatibility

- Wordfence protection remains enabled by default.
- Update notices are hidden only for non-administrator users when Client Mode and the new hide-update option are both enabled.

## WordPress Install Asset

Upload this release asset to WordPress:

```text
mzi-white-label-pro-v3.0.1.zip
```

Do not use GitHub's automatically generated source archive as the WordPress upload package.
